ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Seat of the county */,
  "state_initial" TEXT /* Initial of the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "initial" TEXT /* Initial of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the state data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_data" (
  "real_estate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "studio_2021" INTEGER /* Studio price in 2021 */,
  "bedroom_1_2021" INTEGER /* Bedroom 1 price in 2021 */,
  "bedroom_2_2021" INTEGER /* Bedroom 2 price in 2021 */,
  "bedroom_3_2021" INTEGER /* Bedroom 3 price in 2021 */,
  "bedroom_4_2021" INTEGER /* Bedroom 4 price in 2021 */,
  "studio_2022" INTEGER /* Studio price in 2022 */,
  "bedroom_1_2022" INTEGER /* Bedroom 1 price in 2022 */,
  "bedroom_2_2022" INTEGER /* Bedroom 2 price in 2022 */,
  "bedroom_3_2022" INTEGER /* Bedroom 3 price in 2022 */,
  "bedroom_4_2022" INTEGER /* Bedroom 4 price in 2022 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the real estate data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_estate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "pop2017" INTEGER /* Population in 2017 */,
  "pop2018" INTEGER /* Population in 2018 */,
  "pop2019" INTEGER /* Population in 2019 */,
  "pop2020" INTEGER /* Population in 2020 */,
  "pop2021" INTEGER /* Population in 2021 */,
  "pop2022" INTEGER /* Population in 2022 */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of racial groups */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the distance belongs to */,
  "destination_county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination county */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance in miles */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the distance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_destination_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic coordinate entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the coordinate belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the geographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_coordinates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
